packages.name: KiCad Diff Plugin
packages.description: Visual diff viewer for KiCad schematic and PCB files using git history.
packages.description_full: This package installs an IPC-based KiCad 9 plugin. The toolbar button starts a local Python server and opens a browser dashboard that exports SVG snapshots via kicad-cli, then renders pixel-level diffs with WebGL to compare git versions of .kicad_sch and .kicad_pcb files.
